name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, learning, or stack preset for atom
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement

## What you want

<!-- One-paragraph description of the feature, learning, or preset. -->

## Why it belongs in atom

> Would this help a project unrelated to where the idea came from?

<!-- Apply the generalisation test from CONTRIBUTING.md. If the answer is no, the
     idea probably belongs in your source project's docs, not in atom. -->

## Where it should live

- [ ] New CLI feature (`atom-setup`, `nucleus`, or `model-race` change)
- [ ] New stack preset (`extras/<category>/<preset>/`)
- [ ] New learning (`learnings/<type>/<slug>.md`)
- [ ] New doc (`docs/`)
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Source

<!-- If this came out of a real project, name it. atom evolves with shipped work,
     not speculative ideas. -->

## Sketch

<!-- Optional: outline how it would work, what files it touches, etc. -->
